channel.title: Manufacturing on Gilbert N. Onyenwezi | Operations leader, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Manufacturing on Gilbert N. Onyenwezi | Operations leader, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Portfolio

item.title: AI-Powered Quality Inspection System
item.description:
Problem

Manufacturing environments often rely on manual inspection processes that are inconsistent, slow, and difficult to scale.

Objective

Design a system that uses computer vision and analytics to detect defects earlier, improve classification accuracy, and provide root-cause data.

Tools

Python, Computer Vision, Data Analysis
